title: Object detection (R-CNN family, YOLO, DETR)
focus: Two-stage vs one-stage; how DETR removes anchors and NMS.

items.label: R-CNN family, YOLO, DETR

interviewQuestions: How does U-Net's skip connection design help with segmentation?
